src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Application.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group third-party imports before local project imports.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Jojoaddison.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Update JHipster configuration library import from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster to match the new package structure in JHipster 8.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/aop/logging.general_idea: Update the JHipster constants import path to reflect the package restructuring in newer JHipster versions.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Asyn.general_idea: Update import for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster to match JHipster 8 package structure.
Update import for JHipsterProperties from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster to match JHipster 8 package structure.
Replace wildcard import for Spring scheduling annotations with explicit imports for better code clarity.
Reorganize import statements to group Java standard library, Spring, and third-party imports logically.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cach.general_idea: Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports for Ehcache configuration builders to improve code clarity.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cach.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.ehcache.config.builders.*;' with specific imports for CacheConfigurationBuilder, ExpiryPolicyBuilder, and ResourcePoolsBuilder.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cach.general_idea: Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports for Spring context annotations to improve code clarity.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cach.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.springframework.context.annotation.*;' with specific imports for Bean and Configuration.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cach.general_idea: Update JHipster properties import to reflect the package rename from io.github to tech.jhipster in newer JHipster versions.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cons.general_idea: Add a constant for email validation regex pattern.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.general_idea: Update import statements to reflect the package rename from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster in JHipster 8.
Remove the @EnableElasticsearchRepositories annotation as Elasticsearch support is no longer configured in this class.
Remove the Mongobee schema migration bean configuration which is no longer used or supported in the new setup.
Remove imports for classes that are no longer used in the file, such as Mongobee, MongoClient, and Elasticsearch config.
Remove the unused SLF4J logger field and its associated imports.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Defa.general_idea: Update the JHipster constants import path to reflect the package restructuring in newer JHipster versions.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.general_idea: Remove the Jackson module for serializing RFC7807 Problem objects from the Zalando library.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.general_idea: Remove the Jackson module for serializing ConstraintViolationProblem objects from the Zalando library.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.human_impl: Removed import of org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule and the @Bean method constraintViolationProblemModule().

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Loca.general_idea: Replace the JHipster-specific AngularCookieLocaleResolver with the standard Spring CookieLocaleResolver to remove framework-specific dependencies.
Explicitly set the default locale to English in the new resolver configuration.
Replace wildcard imports with specific imports and add the Locale class import for the new configuration.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Logg.general_idea: Update the import statement for JHipster constants to reflect the package rename from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster in newer versions.
Update JHipster configuration import from the legacy io.github namespace to the new tech.jhipster namespace required by JHipster 8.
Comment out metrics logging configuration to resolve compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3 / JHipster 8.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Logg.general_idea: Replace dynamic Logstash queue size configuration with a hardcoded default value, likely due to API changes or deprecation in the new JHipster version.
